name: Indo-European
notes: Classification-only clade node for the Indo-European branch. Carries no phonology: it is never a data-inheritance source, only a step in the ancestry chain from which `family` is derived.

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald; Forkel, Robert; Haspelmath, Martin; Bank, Sebastian
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology

location.notes: Glottolog's computed centroid for the Indo-European family — a summary of a whole clade's range, not a place anyone speaks.
